records.review: per-level price rows from OpenMU's special-item price dictionary (ItemPriceCalculator.cs, consult D.4); level 0 is the dictionary's 100 default arm, rows 1-3 its level rows, carried-but-unreachable at the shipped max_item_level 0 (the DS-ticket era-stable-table precedent); the base is scaled by current/definition durability in the services ammo branch

1.0-era stat fruit backported from S6 dataset (fruits chaos-mix result); item level 0-4 encodes the fruit's stat kind; consume behavior (stat point add/remove) is a rule, not data; price 33,000,000 is the classic current NPC value from OpenMU's special-item price dictionary (ItemPriceCalculator.cs, consult D.4)

Blood Castle ticket item, approved 1.0-era backport from S6 dataset; gates 7/8 of max_item_level are arguably later-era (7: S1+, 8: S3); per-level price rows from OpenMU's special-item price dictionary (ItemPriceCalculator.cs, consult D.4) (level 0 = the 10,000 default arm, rows 1-8)
